title: Hide Members of different teams from each other
excerpt:
Hi, 
I would like to hide members who are members of different boards. They are my customers and I do not want them to see each other. I tried to find something like this but it seems there’s no solution yet.

posts.author: Aleksei (Aleksei)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I would like to hide members who are members of different boards. They are my customers and I do not want them to see each other. I tried to find something like this but it seems there’s no solution yet.

posts.author: vcdizon04 (Vincent Dizon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, @Aleksei have you tried to add them as Guest on a sharable board?
take a look at this https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/115005340405-What-do-my-guests-see-and-do-on-my-shareable-board-

posts.author: Aleksei (Aleksei)
posts.cookedHtml: Cool, that helps. Thanks a lot Vincent!

posts.author: andresTaruga (Andres)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
How can I avoid the guest can see each other! In the list and icons on the top

Thank you!!
